name: Cloudflare
longDescription: Suite of Cloudflare MCP servers providing access to Cloudflare products including Documentation, Workers Bindings, Workers Builds, Observability, Containers, Browser Rendering, Logpush, AI Gateway, Audit Logs, DNS Analytics, and more. Each server provides specialized tools for its product area.
author: com.cloudflare.mcp
examplePrompts: Search Cloudflare docs for Workers best practices
Get DNS analytics for my zone
List my Workers and their deployments
Spin up a sandbox container for testing
